title: Raccoon Removal in Midwood Brooklyn | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Midwood, Brooklyn. Humane trapping & exclusion for homes near Brooklyn College & Avenue M. Licensed experts. Call now for fast service!
intro: Raccoons in Midwood are increasingly invading attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces throughout this historic Brooklyn neighborhood. From the tree-lined streets near Brooklyn College to the classic single-family homes along Ocean Avenue, property owners face persistent raccoon intrusion problems. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive, humane raccoon removal services tailored to Midwood's unique residential architecture.
whyUs: Our technicians have extensive experience serving Midwood's diverse housing stock, from pre-war brick homes to modern renovations. We combine humane trapping methods with permanent exclusion solutions, backed by our wildlife specialists who understand Brooklyn raccoon behavior and local building codes.
localContext: Midwood's mature tree canopy and proximity to Marine Park and Prospect Park create ideal raccoon habitats, with wildlife frequently moving between green spaces and residential areas. The neighborhood's mix of detached homes, Tudor-style houses near Avenue M, and multi-family buildings around Kings Highway all present unique access points that raccoons exploit for nesting.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Midwood?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Midwood typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of animals, entry points, and necessary repairs. A single raccoon in an easily accessible attic starts around $900, while a family with babies requiring extensive exclusion work and damage repair can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Midwood Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Midwood due to the neighborhood's abundant trees, proximity to parks, and older homes with accessible attics and chimneys. The area's mature landscaping near Brooklyn College and tree-lined residential streets provide perfect habitat and food sources. Raccoons often nest in attics, especially during spring birthing season from March through May.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Midwood home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Midwood service calls within 24 hours for initial inspection and can often begin trapping the same day. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons and whether babies are present. Mother raccoons with young require special handling to ensure humane removal of the entire family, which may extend the timeline slightly.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by raccoons in Midwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete raccoon damage restoration including insulation replacement, structural repairs, waste cleanup, and sanitization. Our service includes sealing all entry points to prevent re-entry, repairing torn roof vents, damaged soffits, and compromised chimney caps. We also offer attic decontamination to remove hazardous droppings and urine-soaked insulation common in Midwood's older homes.
